enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder on June 11, 2017, sharing progress on a personal project to compile ancient classical texts into a digital format. He describes completing Polybius (a 57-page menu compiled from Wikisource and Project Gutenberg), working on Cyprian (a church father), and plans to continue cataloging all ancient classics through the fall of Rome.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: best place to find ancient texts outside Wikisource
views it as a meaningful accomplishment worth noting
recommends listening to him, finds his takes on plutocracy interesting
